creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 164686
patch to remove suport for irc/irssi-devel

irc/irssi-devel expired on 2015-12-13 but this port still optionally depends on it.
Remove support for irc/irssi-devel and the associated option definitons because now only irc/irssi is left.

Add NO_ARCH=yes because this port only installs a single Perl file.
